recency.label: regular trading day + immediate after-hours
recency.calendar: NYSE-like US equity calendar with weekends and major Wall Street holidays

source_policy.paywall_policy: Extract if accessible; never invent text behind a paywall.
source_policy.historical_context_policy: Use prior BoltNews markdown artifacts only; do not web-search stale context.

briefing_template.summary_md_policy: article digest/link index only; never primary dashboard content

verification_gates.rule: Each article needs parseable published_at inside the recency window unless explicitly typed market_data.
Reject stale indicators unless clearly historical context from BoltNews archives.
Reject headline-only records; require lead paragraph or extracted_text/body snippet.
Require explicit market impact, signal keywords, or direct macro/asset relevance.
Dedupe on canonical URL, normalized URL, and normalized headline/source pair.

briefing.md must include required sections for post-market: Closing Market Snapshot, Why Markets Moved, Equity Market Internals, Rates, Macro, and Policy, Earnings and Corporate Developments, Cross-Asset Confirmation or Divergence, Tomorrow Setup, Source Notes and Data Quality
Rendered dashboard TOC anchors must resolve and internal links must not 404.

recency_warning: AGENT INSTRUCTION: Only accept articles published within the past 8.5 hours (window starts 2026-06-25T09:30:00-04:00). All search queries include 'June 25, 2026' to enforce recency. DO NOT include articles outside that trading-session window, including prior-day rally articles in a post-market recap. Historical context is stored in markdown dumps — this pipeline is for NEW content only.
